Rows: What is the best way to identify outliers in multivariate data?

gt_sql: SELECT T3.Title, T2.LinkTypeId FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN postLinks AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.RelatedPostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'What are principal component scores?'

Rows: What is the best way to identify outliers in multivariate data?

pred_sql: SELECT p2.Title, pl.LinkTypeId FROM posts p1 JOIN postLinks pl ON p1.Id = pl.PostId JOIN posts p2 ON pl.RelatedPostId = p2.Id WHERE p1.Title = 'What are principal component scores?'
